lared.title: The Network
lared.description: Learn about our mission, vision and the research lines that drive educational and social development across Ibero-America.
lared.missionText: The Network's mission is to make research a vital process stemming from the interests, motivations and affinities of the diverse areas of knowledge that comprise it. This process must be carried out in a collegiate, organized and systematic manner among all its members and collaborators.
lared.visionText: The RII's vision is to position itself as the central axis of research that supports the solution of various problems arising in the educational field. It seeks to strengthen curricula and, consequently, comprehensive university education in different areas of knowledge.
lared.mapDescription: A living network of scientific collaboration connecting 16 countries and more than 80 researchers.
lared.researchDescription: Aimed at strengthening projects that generate impact in development, innovation and the improvement of society.
lared.transversalDescription: Topics that cut across all research lines
lared.docsDescription: Explore the fundamental documents that support and guide the work of the Ibero-American Research Network.
lared.adhesionDescription: Membership documents of institutions that are part of the Ibero-American Research Network

miembros.title: Network Members
miembros.description: Leading institutions united by their commitment to research, innovation and academic excellence across Ibero-America.
miembros.messageP1: "The Ibero-American Research Network (RII) was born with the conviction that science should not be an isolated effort, but a bridge toward common development. Our vision for 2026 is to consolidate an ecosystem where technology and ethics walk hand in hand, transforming each finding into a tangible solution for our society.
miembros.messageP2: Through events like CAISEB, we reaffirm our commitment to enhancing the capabilities of our academics and professionals, aligning with national and international development goals. We are not only building a knowledge network; we are designing the productive and human future of Ibero-America."
miembros.alliesDescription: Meet the organizations that make our mission to strengthen research possible.
